title: Any More Ores
description: Adds more ores to the game. Currently just Rainbow Ore.
body:
This mod is made with Mcreator. This mod adds more ores to the game in Beta 0.1.0 Rainbow ore has been added to the game. In Beta 0.2.1 more crafting recipes will be added other than just a pickaxe (reminder to get the Rainbow Diamond you must mine it with a Diamond Pickaxe+)! If any of you want to have your ideas put into this mod than comment what you want. I am Coming out with a new mod called Any More Blocks soon adding the same things from this mod but with new textures and more different things added to the game. Thank you!

Wiki is at: https://any-more-minecraft-mods.fandom.com/wiki/
